entity.summary: Cardano decentralized exchange focused on listing and trading bond tokens issued by Optim, using AMM-based liquidity and on-chain spot trading without centralized intermediaries.
entity.notes: Current first-party Dano Finance domain remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Dano Finance as a Cardano AMM DEX for listing and trading Optim bond tokens and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and active DEX volume. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Dano Finance official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Dano Finance domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Dano Finance metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Dano Finance as a decentralized Cardano exchange for listing and trading bond tokens issued by Optim and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and active DEX volume.

evidence.title: Dano Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Dano Finance as a Cardano DEX and corroborates the current exchange identity.
